title: WebUIActionAudit
description: Schema for an append-only WebUI action audit entry. Every action request (preview or execute) produces one audit record for traceability. Designed for NDJSON append-only logs. See docs/ai-native/webui-action-contract.md for policy and field-level documentation.

auditId.description: Unique id for this audit entry. Used as the idempotency key in the audit log.

requestId.description: Matches the requestId from the originating WebUIActionRequest.

actionType.description: The action type that was requested.

humanRequired.description: Whether the action required human initiation.

targetSummary.description: One-line summary of what the action targeted (e.g. 'issue:540, provider:openai-1'). Never contains secrets.

allowlistUsed.description: The allowlist that was enforced. Empty for preview mode or when not applicable.

reason.description: The justification provided in the request. Null for preview mode or low-risk actions without a reason.

requestedBy.description: Identity of the requester (e.g. 'human:login', 'agent:worker-id'). Null if unknown.

blockerCount.description: Number of blockers if outcome was blocked. 0 otherwise.

errorCount.description: Number of errors if outcome was error. 0 otherwise.

effectCount.description: Number of effects produced or applied.

requestedAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when the action was requested.

capturedAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when this audit entry was written.

durationMs.description: Wall-clock time for the action. Null for preview mode.
